{
  "claims": [
    "California is home to one of the largest Korean populations in the country.",
    "Korean Americans have enriched California's cultural fabric, contributed to innovation in industries, and fostered stronger relations between the U.S. and Korea.",
    "Senate Bill 269 would provide tax credits to homeowners for upgrades to protect against natural disasters.",
    "Senate Bill 268 proposes a tax exemption on settlements during a state of emergency.",
    "Senate Bill 267 would provide a tax credit for teachers who spend personal funds on classroom supplies.",
    "Senate Bill 529 offers a state tax deduction for families saving for higher education.",
    "Senate Bill 665 introduces a tax credit for retailers to invest in security measures against theft.",
    "Senate Bill 666 would provide a tax credit for homeowners who invest in home security systems.",
    "Senate Bill 405 aims to restore local control over voter ID requirements.",
    "Senate Bill 406 would require all ballots to be counted by Election Day to ensure efficient and transparent election processes.",
    "Senate Bill 408 focuses on improving the accuracy of voter rolls by verifying voter addresses."
  ]
}
